name: Permission Gate
summary: Require an explicit approval step before risky tool use, runtime mutation, or external side effects.

source.provenance: Manual seed from the oh-my-codex execution model that keeps risky actions behind explicit approval.

name: Review Loop
summary: Run a generate-review-fix cycle until the harness reaches an acceptable quality bar.

source.provenance: Manual seed from the gstack review-and-fix workflow family that repeatedly re-checks work.

name: MCP Registration
summary: Attach MCP servers or connectors and gate their usage behind explicit runtime configuration.

source.provenance: Manual seed from the oh-my-openagent MCP attachment patterns for runtime-integrated tools.

name: Memory Persistence
summary: Persist session context so the harness can resume, checkpoint, or carry forward prior decisions.

source.provenance: Manual seed from persistent state and session-memory scaffolding patterns in the superpowers reference set.

name: Retry Loop
summary: Retry a bounded task after a failed check or unmet constraint until the loop succeeds or stops safely.

source.provenance: Manual seed from ouroboros-style recursive retry and recovery patterns.

name: Subagent Delegation
summary: Split work across helper agents, merge their output, and keep ownership boundaries explicit.

source.provenance: Manual seed from multi-agent delegation patterns in the oh-my-claudecode reference family.
